steps.title: Apply the volume formula for a rectangular prism
steps.content: The volume of a right rectangular prism equals the product of length, width, and height. With $l = 11$ m, $w = 8$ m, and $h = 10$ m: $$V = 11 \times 8 \times 10$$

steps.title: Calculate the result
steps.content: Evaluate the product: $11 \times 8 = 88$, then $88 \times 10 = 880$. The volume is 880 cubic meters.
